discussion_posts.name: Aayush0606
discussion_posts.content: It\'s simple question with low constraints, can be solved easily using brute force.\n`hint` : try to think of what index can you consider , then check if those index are valid or not.\n[My Solution](https://leetcode.com/problems/find-indices-with-index-and-value-difference-i/solutions/4169702/simple-c/) for the same.

discussion_posts.name: StefanelStan
discussion_posts.content: 1. Loop with i from i to n-IndexDiff; Inside, loop with j from indexDiff + i to n\n2. If the two numbers satisfy the condition, return the pair [i,j]

discussion_posts.content: Using brutal force is an easy solution. But there is O(n) solution there.\nHint: max and min for prefix list
